notes: Mocks locked. Two new primitives (.verdict-card, .date-header sticky month heading); the rest reuse HQ/F001/F002 tokens. Five verdict-pill colour families cover the 14 kinds our parser emits. Need brand-approved copy for: (1) the anti-marketing preamble, (2) the FDR explainer prose, (3) the closing disclaimer, (4) verdict_label strings for each entry in publication_manifest.json.
review_criteria: FDR explainer readable at 8th-grade reading level -- no PhD jargon
Verdict labels: short (<= 24 chars), state-not-outcome ('Alive -- sole survivor', not 'Winner')
